prompt: Editorial portrait of a person with a precision-cut short bob, photographed in natural window light from the side so the sharp line of the cut reads clearly along the jaw. The subject is positioned in the right two-thirds of the frame, and the left third is a softly out-of-focus warm-stone interior wall that holds negative space for heading text on top. Warm neutral tones throughout, a shallow depth of field, hair that reads as freshly cut with visible shape and movement. Editorial fashion-magazine sensibility rather than a commercial headshot; calm, unsmiling, considered. Avoid any visible text, logos, watermarks, signage, or printed labels; avoid heavy jewelry and heavy makeup; avoid a rose-gold or marble beauty-bar aesthetic; avoid overly posed smiling stock-photo framing.
